steps.title: Identify the unresolved question
steps.content: The passage opens with “it's been unclear what effects these forests may have on stream biodiversity”—the defining signal that sets up an unresolved question about forest effects.

steps.title: Match the answer to the passage's purpose
steps.content: The correct answer identifies the text as presenting a study that addresses an unresolved question about forests in agricultural streams—exactly what the passage does. The other three either misidentify the study's focus (A: agricultural yield debates; B: comparing strategies across environments) or misframe its purpose (C: challenging a prior view rather than investigating an open question). That matches choice D — D is correct.
